headline: L3Harris Technologies plans $1.3B solid rocket motor expansion in Virginia
summary: The investment builds on the missile manufacturer’s previous $41.2 million investment at its Orange County facilities.

headline: Cathie Wood Slams The Brakes — Ark Invest Sits Out As S&P 500 Smashes Records
summary: Ark Invest made no trades in its six main ETFs for two straight days, a rare feat. Here's how the ETFs are performing in 2026.
